# ParseFS called with a spread []string variable for patterns. Template
# type errors should still be caught.

! check-templates
stderr 'BadField'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"embed"
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

//go:embed templates/*.gohtml
var source embed.FS

type Page struct {
	Title string
}

var patterns = []string{"templates/index.gohtml"}

var ts = template.Must(template.New("").ParseFS(source, patterns...))

func handleIndex(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = ts.ExecuteTemplate(w, "index.gohtml", Page{Title: "Home"})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- templates/index.gohtml --
<h1>{{.BadField}}</h1>
